DISCOVERY 610, PLAINTIFF PINNACLE LAW GROUP, LLP'S MOTION TO COMPEL DEFENDANTS LIVEUNIVERSE AND BRAD GREENSPAN TO RESPOND TO INTERROGATORIES AND DEMAND FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS; AND FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS GRANTED: A. ALL OBJECTIONS ARE WAIVED, EXCEPT ATTORNEY CLIENT AND ATTORNEY WORK PRODUCT PRIVILEGE; B. EACH DEFENDANT SHALL SERVE FULL, COMPLETE AND VERIFIED RESPONSE TO PLAINTIFF'S FIRST SET OF SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES, AND FIRST DEMAND FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS WITHIN TEN DAYS OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF THIS ORDER; C. SANCTIONS SHALL ISSUE AGAINST DEFENDANT IN THE SUM OF $390.00, PAYABLE WITHIN THIRTY DAYS OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF THIS ORDER. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT

Motion To Compel Deft'S Liveuniverse And Brad Greenspan To Appear At Depo & For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Dec-24-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
JEAN P. TEPPER, ESQ., (415)788-6151, FOR PLAINTIFF/MOVING PARTY
ELIZABETH A. MACDONALD, ESQ., (415)922-5939, FOR DEFENDANT/OPPOSING PARTY

THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED, AS MODIFIED AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF PINNACLE LAW GROUP, LLP'S Motion to compel defendants LiveUniverse and Brad Greenspan to appear at deposition and for sanctions granted:
a. Within ten days of notice of entry of this order, defendants shall appear for, and testify at deposition to be held at a date, time and place to be determined by plaintiff;
b. Sanctions shall issue AGAINST DEFENDANT in the sum of $3,243.25, payable within thirty days of notice of entry of this order; COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT (610/PS)

Mtn To Compel Deft'S Liveuniverse And Brad Greenspan To Respond To Interoggs And Demand For Production Of Docs & For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Dec-24-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
JEAN P. TEPPER, ESQ., (415)788-6151, FOR PLAINTIFF/MOVING PARTY
ELIZABETH A. MACDONALD, ESQ., (415)922-5939, FOR DEFENDANT/OPPOSING PARTY

THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED, AS MODIFIED AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF PINNACLE LAW GROUP, LLP'S Motion to compel defendants LiveUniverse and Brad Greenspan to respond to interrogatories and demand for production of documents; and for monetary sanctions granted:
a. All objections are waived, except attorney client and attorney work product privilege;
b. Each defendant shall serve full, complete and verified response to plaintiff's first set of special interrogatories, and first demand for production of documents within ten days of notice of entry of this order;
c. Sanctions shall issue AGAINST DEFENDANT in the sum of $390.00, payable within thirty days of notice of entry of this order. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT (610/PS)
